key_items: Bitcoin crashes below $60K support for first time in months, breaking 200-week moving average
Bitcoin bears face $2.6B short trap at $60K with potential for short squeeze reversal
Strong macro headwind: May payrolls beat triggers hawkish Fed expectations, pressuring crypto assets
reasoning: Bitcoin is in acute downtrend with macro headwinds from hawkish labor data and technical breakdown below key support levels, creating near-term downside risk. However, extreme fear indicators (Fear Index at 12, $60K approaching mining cost floor) and massive short positioning ($2.6B) suggest capitulation may be near, potentially setting up a reversal within the 1-7 day window.
risks: Bitcoin could test $53K-$50K if $60K support fails to hold as macro uncertainty persists and liquidation cascades accelerate institutional selling.
